targets.rawSql: WITH a AS (SELECT o.strategy_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.metadata::jsonb->>'resolution' IS NOT NULL) AS n_predicted, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.metadata::jsonb->>'resolution' = 'win') AS n_correct, COUNT(*) AS n_rows FROM trading.orders o LEFT JOIN trading.fills f ON f.order_id = o.order_id AND f.metadata::jsonb->>'kind' = 'settle' WHERE o.mode='paper' AND o.strategy_id IN ('contest_ensemble_v1','contest_avengers_v1') AND o.ts_submit > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY o.strategy_id) SELECT strategy_id, n_predicted, n_correct, CASE WHEN n_predicted > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * n_correct / n_predicted, 1) ELSE NULL END AS accuracy_pct FROM a ORDER BY accuracy_pct DESC NULLS LAST;
SELECT week_start AS time, strategy_id AS metric, accuracy::float AS value FROM research.contest_ab_weekly ORDER BY week_start;
SELECT week_start AS time, strategy_id AS metric, coverage::float AS value FROM research.contest_ab_weekly ORDER BY week_start;

SELECT week_start, strategy_id, n_predicted, n_correct, ROUND(accuracy*100,1) AS accuracy_pct, ROUND(coverage*100,1) AS coverage_pct, ROUND(adjusted*100,2) AS adjusted_pct, ROUND(ci_lower*100,1) AS ci_lo_pct, ROUND(ci_upper*100,1) AS ci_hi_pct, ROUND(p_value_vs_baseline::numeric, 4) AS p_value FROM research.contest_ab_weekly ORDER BY week_start DESC, strategy_id;

panels.title: Confusion matrix — last 7d (YES_UP vs YES_DOWN × win/loss)

targets.rawSql: SELECT o.strategy_id, CASE WHEN o.instrument_id LIKE '%YES%' THEN 'YES_UP' ELSE 'YES_DOWN' END AS predicted_side, f.metadata::jsonb->>'resolution' AS outcome, COUNT(*) AS n FROM trading.orders o JOIN trading.fills f ON f.order_id = o.order_id AND f.metadata::jsonb->>'kind' = 'settle' WHERE o.mode='paper' AND o.strategy_id IN ('contest_ensemble_v1','contest_avengers_v1') AND o.ts_submit > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY o.strategy_id, predicted_side, outcome ORDER BY o.strategy_id, predicted_side, outcome;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM market_data.liquidation_clusters WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM market_data.chainlink_updates WHERE ts > now() - interval '5 minutes';
SELECT age_s::float AS value FROM market_data.chainlink_updates ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS value FROM research.models WHERE name='hmm_regime_btc5m' AND is_active=true;
